page.title: Introduction
page.p: This Appendix contains variations and additions to the Building Code of Australia (BCA) which are necessary for its application in Western Australia. For Volume Two these apply to:

ul.li: Fire separation of roofed outdoor areas,
Energy efficiency requirements for alterations or extensions to existing buildings,
The design and installation of eaves gutter.

page.p: Note: The Building Regulations 2012 in Western Australia make other modifications to the BCA. These modifications may change during a BCA cycle, and include:

ul.li: Regulation 15C - the dis-application of the livable (accessible) housing provisions and energy efficiency heating and cooling load limits making them voluntary.

page.p: Refer to the latest Building Regulations 2012 available from www.legislation.wa.gov.au for other modifications.
